# {ComponentName}

## Purpose

**When to use:** Describe primary use cases.

**When not to use:** Describe anti-patterns.

## Anatomy

```
[Diagram or description of component parts]
```

## Variants

| Variant | `Description` |
| --------- | `-------------` |
| default | `...` |
| ... | `...` |

## States

- Default, Hover, Focus, Active
- Disabled, Loading, Error (if applicable)

## Accessibility

- Keyboard: ...
- ARIA: ...
- Focus order: ...

## Code example

```tsx
<ComponentName prop="value">
  Content
</ComponentName>
```

## Do / Don't

**Do:** Brief guideline.

**Don't:** Anti-pattern to avoid.
